description: E2E test of CTO Play workflow using alerthub-e2e-test PRD. Tests full lifecycle from intake through deployment. All workflows run in-cluster. Includes Linear Agent API validation and two-way communication testing.

userStories.title: Verify configuration for in-cluster execution
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify cto-config.json is configured for in-cluster (not local) execution
acceptanceCriteria: Read cto-config.json and verify defaults.intake.local is FALSE - intake must run as Argo workflow
Verify defaults.play.autoMerge is true for full autonomy
Verify defaults.play.healerEndpoint is set (http://localhost:8083 for local Healer API)
Verify defaults.linear.pmServerUrl points to PM server (http://localhost:8081 for local)
Run: curl http://localhost:8081/health - PM Server must be running to receive webhooks
Run: curl http://localhost:8083/health - Healer API must be running
Verify kubectl context is set to correct cluster with CTO deployed
userStories.notes: CRITICAL: local=false means intake runs as Argo workflow in cluster, not as local binary

userStories.title: Initiate intake via CTO MCP tool (in-cluster)
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start intake using mcp_cto_intake which submits an Argo workflow
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_intake(project_name='alerthub-e2e-test')
Verify response indicates Linear project was created
Verify PRD issue created with Morgan auto-assigned as delegate
Morgan assignment triggers webhook to PM server → Argo Workflow created
Call mcp_cto_jobs() to see intake workflow running in Argo
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify Morgan agent session created in Linear, first thought activity within 10s'
Log intake workflow name to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Intake: PRD → Linear → Webhook → Argo Workflow → Morgan pod

userStories.title: Monitor intake and verify Linear agent dialogue
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify intake completes AND Linear agent activities are populated
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_jobs(include=['intake']) - poll until 'Succeeded'
Verify tasks.json generated and committed to docs repository
Task 1 should have agentHint='bolt' (infrastructure always first)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Check Morgan session activities: thought/action/response flow, plan checklist updates'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Check for any errors in intake workflow logs'
Verify Linear PRD issue has agent dialogue populated (not empty)
Log task count and agent assignments to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Morgan runs in pod, emits activities to Linear via sidecar

userStories.title: Start Play workflow and verify session notification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start Play and verify both Healer and Linear are notified
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play()
Verify Argo workflow submitted (check response)
Call mcp_cto_jobs(include=['play']) to confirm play workflow running
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Verify Healer received session with expected tools per agent'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify Bolt assigned as delegate to Task 1 issue, session created'
Log play workflow name and starting task_id to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Play orchestrates: Argo Workflow → Controller → CodeRuns (pods) per agent

userStories.title: Monitor Play agent sequence with Linear dialogue verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify agents execute in order AND Linear activities stream correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() periodically to track progress
Verify stages: infrastructure (Bolt) → implementation (Rex/Blaze) → quality (Cleo) → security (Cipher) → testing (Tess) → integration (Atlas)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'For each agent stage, verify: delegate assignment, first thought within 10s, activities streaming, final response'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Watch pod logs for tool inventory mismatch, MCP init failures (A10/A11/A12)'
Log each stage transition to progress.txt with timestamps
userStories.notes: Each agent runs as CodeRun pod with Linear sidecar emitting activities

userStories.title: Test two-way communication (user input)
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify users can send input to running agents via Linear
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Test user input capability during an active agent session'
While an agent is running, send a comment/prompt via Linear mentioning the agent
Verify prompt activity appears in agent session
Verify agent's sidecar detects input via polling (get_session_activities)
Verify input is forwarded to agent via FIFO (if implemented)
Log test result to progress.txt: 'User input test: PASS/FAIL'
userStories.notes: Tests the input_poll_task in status-sync.rs. Nice-to-have if not fully implemented.

userStories.title: Verify Healer and Linear monitoring integration
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm both monitoring subagents detected all relevant events
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Final report: any A10/A11/A12 alerts? GitHub issues created?'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Final report: all sessions complete? Any missing activities? Delegates correct throughout?'
Cross-reference: Healer session tracking matches Linear session states
Log combined monitoring summary to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Validates both monitoring layers caught all events

userStories.title: Complete full lifecycle verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm entire in-cluster lifecycle completed successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() - verify workflow 'Succeeded'
Verify PR was created by implementation agent's GitHub App
Verify PR was merged by Atlas (autoMerge=true)
All CodeRun pods should have completed successfully
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify all agent sessions show state=complete with final response activity'
Log final summary to progress.txt: workflow names, duration, success/failure
userStories.notes: Full E2E: MCP intake() → Argo → Linear → MCP play() → CodeRuns → Merged PR
